installCommand: npm install && cd frontend && npm install

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.paypal.com https://www.paypalobjects.com https://vercel.live; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://vercel.live; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://vercel.live https://assets.vercel.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.paypal.com https://api-m.paypal.com https://api-m.sandbox.paypal.com https://www.paypal.com https://vercel.live wss://ws-us3.pusher.com https://sockjs-us3.pusher.com; frame-src https://www.paypal.com https://www.sandbox.paypal.com https://vercel.live; object-src 'none';
